selection_basis.ledger_reason: This is the first untouched deep-archive packet sibling after the already-reduced packet-empty floor and the cleanest packet-presence contradiction object in the strip.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the parent into a smaller batch that preserves four-lane packet presence, zero-counter collapse versus nonzero deeper residue, duplicate event inflation, same-name strategy packet identity split, and accepted-spine versus schema-fail overlay without reopening the broader replay lineage.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Best next sibling once the packet-loop contradiction case is reduced.
Useful later for resume-chain semantics rather than packet-identity contradiction.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent packet already retains the hashes, counters, packet payload splits, event inflation, and contradiction map needed for a second-pass reduction, and the consulted A2-mid anchors already preserve the archive-role floor and sibling execution comparison boundary.
